headline: Quiet day with no meetings, emails, or Slack activity — use it to drive progress on the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079) and fix broken Salesforce/Snowflake integrations.

quick_wins.why: You're flying blind on customer escalations — this is a security/config issue that blocks daily visibility
Metrics dashboard is down; you can't track agents-in-production or evals adoption without it

must_make_progress.task: Draft the 'Generated evaluations - clarify no ground truth' design doc (AE-1079)
must_make_progress.why: This is your only active Jira ticket, has no due date set (risk of drifting), and evals is a key 26.4 deliverable called out in the Big Rock OKR page. Calendar is clear — maximize deep work today.

must_communicate_with.about: Align on the 'no ground truth' evaluation approach — get their input on feasibility before finalizing the design doc
Coordinate on evals patterns (DeepRAG, BatchTransform) and how no-ground-truth evals fit into the validation story

agents_in_production.vs_goal: Snowflake auth broken — fix credentials to restore visibility

evals_adoption.vs_goal: Snowflake auth broken — this is your direct domain, urgent to restore

flags: Salesforce integration is broken (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations or high-priority cases. Reach out to IT/DevOps to rotate credentials.
Snowflake metrics are inaccessible (empty password) — you cannot verify any OKR progress for the Big Rock review.
AE-1079 has no due date set — risk of deprioritization. Consider setting a target date today.
Autopilot is flagged as Risk Yellow in the Big Rock OKR — monitor for any spillover impact on evals work.
Next Big Rock bi-weekly TR may be approaching — confirm date and prepare evals update.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today — priority is restoring Salesforce and Snowflake visibility to ensure no escalations are missed and OKR tracking resumes.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are unavailable due to broken Snowflake auth; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079) is the highest-leverage adoption-driving work today.

slack_summary: Quiet day: no meetings, no emails, no Slack activity — ideal for deep work. Top priority: make substantial progress on the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079), which ties directly to key 26.4 deliverables. Second priority: fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so you regain visibility into escalations and adoption metrics. Zero meetings today.
